end,{},function(X,r)local I=K(r)local U=function(U,z,i,G)return g(X,{U;z,i;G},r,I)end return U end,function(X)n[X]=n[X]-(-878828+878829)if-316112-(-316112)==n[X]then n[X],p[X]=nil,nil end end,function(X,r)local I=K(r)local U=function(U,z,i,G,H,p)return g(X,{U;z,i;G;H,p},r,I)end return U end return(y(8236331-(-205248),{}))(I(H))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
